feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Is it love or are we just friends with tension?
entry.summary:
Author: Val_in_a_trenchcoat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,012Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 119

Summary: “Eddie,” Buck asks, in the usual tone he has when a stray thought has drifted across his mind that just has to be said aloud.Eddie prepares himself for whatever sentence follows, usually consisting of words that should never, ever be strung together.“Have you ever considered sleeping with a guy?”Eddie slowly, carefully, looks up from his bowl of cereal. “What?”Or: Eddie Diaz and the sexuality crisis he is not having, but Buck thinks he should have. For science!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Holding Hands Meant Something, Baby
entry.summary:
Author: catwalksalone

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,444Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Eddie has a touch problem. A touching Buck problem.They're in the car one song closer to home when Eddie reaches for Buck's hand. He doesn't plan it or think about why, just stretches out and takes hold of it, takes hold of Buck, keeps hold of him. Safe.

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,428Chapters: 10/13Kudos: 524

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck fights to reclaim his place at the 118. But the team he came back for doesn’t quite feel like home anymore, and the distance between him and Eddie keeps widening. Buck feels himself slowly disappearing - first from the team, then from himself. He's always been good at saving other people. He's never been good at saving himself. Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: Kisses on repeat
entry.summary:
Author: Ariiiflowers (Peaceandflowers)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,616Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 120

Summary: "Eddie knows something is going on. He can feel it—there's something different in the air, Buck is acting a little strange, and every time he walks into a conversation at the station, everyone goes quiet. But he decides to ignore it; maybe he's overthinking a bit and it's all in his head.Until little things start happening between Buck and him that make him think maybe he isn't completely wrong." Or "Five times Buck kisses Eddie 'accidentally,' and once Eddie ends up kissing Buck."

entry.title: Not Okay (and Not Alone)
entry.summary:
Author: ThoseTwoFirefighters

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,980Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: Buck hadn’t meant for it to become an addiction. He didn’t mean for it to get this bad. But once he started, he couldn’t stop. It had started innocently. He didn’t want people to worry about him after the kidnapping so he shrugged it off. Tried to deal with it on his own. He told everyone, including Eddie, that he was okay. That he was moving on. He acted normal. Showed up to his shifts on time like always, bantered and joked with everyone at work, the usual. The pills hadn’t been planned. He hadn’t planned to get addicted to them. But the pills quieted the noise inside his head. Eventually, he began to chase that feeling. The feeling of not having the chaos in his head. Of not having to feel. It was nice to not have to deal with the anxiety, and the fear, and the weight of his trauma while still putting on a brave face for everyone else. Eventually that feeling was a feeling he couldn’t live without. So he turned to the comfort of the pills whenever the noise became too much. Unfortunately, that was a lot lately.ORIn the aftermath of his kidnapping, Buck struggles with addiction to pills and accidentally overdoses. Luckily Eddie is there to pull him out of the darkness.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: Begen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,535Chapters: 14/29Kudos: 301

Summary: Ever since losing his team and leaving the Seals, Buck has been alone, haunted by his past. His arrival at the 118 provides him a chance to move forward, but his past is never too far behind.

entry.title: Project Primus
entry.summary:
Author: TrustyRobot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,639Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 471

Summary: “Okay,” Tony murmured. “We’ve got layered encryption. Redundant partitions. Someone really didn’t want this touched.” “Can you get in?” Sam asked. Tony scoffed. “Please.” Directories began populating across the screen. WEAPONS DEVELOPMENTSERUM ITERATIONSASSET DEPLOYMENTSTRATEGIC EMBED NETWORK Natasha leaned closer. “That last one’s sleeper agents.” Steve’s jaw tightened. Of course it was.

entry.title: Etched in Panic
entry.summary:
Author: TrustyRobot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,514Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 24

Summary: There were no hard and fast rules when it came to soulmarks, but there were a few generally accepted principles: 1. The marks are echoes of your soulmate’s first waking thoughts, usually in their native language. 2. The marks last anywhere from a few hours to a full day, depending on the intensity of emotion. 3. They appear sporadically, not every first thought is focused enough to appear as a mark. 4. They appear on your body the moment your soulmate wakes, regardless of time zone. 5. It’s rude to examine or comment on someone else’s marks 6. Evan “Buck” Buckley doesn’t have a soulmate. Okay, maybe that last one was known only to two people, Buck himself and his sister Maddie, and Maddie refused to agree with him on this matter. Buck maintained however, that 28 years was plenty long enough to wait for an echo of his own without finally l accepting that, clearly, he was one of those unlucky few who didn’t get a soulmate. Sure, not everyone found their person- their echo, but most people at least got marks that gave them hope that their soulmate was out there somewhere. Not Buck, though. No, Buck was obviously meant to be alone forever. Or at least between hookups.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The One On The Way Home from Nashville
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_Girl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,296Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 202

Summary: Buck is leaning against the truck, his curls a hot mess from being pressed against the passenger window, smiling as he approaches. “She’s cute.” “Great, so why don’t you go ask her out. Maybe you can find an open diner or bar around here and take her out on the town.” He grabs his bag as he gestures around him at the desert, his voice dripping with sarcasm. Grabbing the cooler out of Buck’s hand, he walks to the motel room door to unlock it. “I have been on two dates recently; it’s your turn now. She would be great practice for when we get back to LA, so you can officially ask Alex out on a date.” Buck says as he follows behind him. “Buck, I’m not asking Alex out.” He’s not mad at Buck; he gets that Buck thinks he’s being a supportive wingman. He also knows that Buck doesn’t know the secrets Eddie has been keeping. OR: Eddie is so over Buck trying to play wingman.

entry.title: Everything connects to Buck
entry.summary:
Author: Readitwatchitwriteit

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,711Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Buck is Bobby's nephew and came to live with Bobby and Marcy at 12 years old after Danny and Mads moved out of the house. Someone called CPS and Evan was removed from the house to be raised by Bobby and Marcy. This is that story, Bobby Jr (RJ) and Brooke (B) survive the fire and live with their cousin Danny for a while well their dad and Buck become who they are. Chapter 1 is the story of Buck (Evan) growing up with Bobby, Marcy, Danny, and Kira (Danny's amazingly kickass girlfriend) caring for him. Maddie is still there as well, but more a s a background character in the first few chapters. Buck and Eddie will get together, but it's gonna be a few chapters before he's even introduced. I will try and follow most major plotlines, but it is told more in snap shots then flowing scenes. Please be aware of this! There is a mention of some Lonestar characters in here as well.

entry.title: Missing the Gun Fights and Coercion
entry.summary:
Author: stupid_for_u

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,166Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 50

Summary: The luck it had taken him to get into the 118, his first station, mind you, had never sat right with him. Then again, lots of things didn’t sit right. Like the fact that on his last shift, he’d nearly been taken out by a supporting beam that the flames hadn’t even reached yet. Logically, Buck knew there was no reason for it to fall, and definitely no reason for it to fall directly at him. In a previous life, Buck would have thought it was planned. In this life, he chalked it up to a freak accident. Those things happened every day; he saw it every day. It was just a freak accident. But then, Edmundo fucking Diaz showed up in his locker room, and Buck knew. He knew someone was trying to kill him. ~~ Buck is a retired spy trying to make his way as a firefighter. His life was going well until his old partner turned up undercover at his station. Eddie was tasked with being Buck's bodyguard now that they were the only two surviving members of their old team. Can they protect each other long enough to figure out who's systematically assassinating everyone from Buck's past life, while simultaneously hiding their connection from the rest of the 118?

entry.title: The Now, The Then, The Thinking Of When
entry.summary:
Author: stolen_pen_name23

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,532Chapters: 5/15Kudos: 71

Summary: “Just rest now,” Bobby says. His voice retains the authority of a commanding officer — the tone that Eddie has been drilled to obey since he was seventeen. But behind it is something else. Something with more worry, more anguish. “Wait,” Eddie says. Memories hide behind frosted glass in his mind. Something is missing, something important. His eyes sweep the room, searching every corner for the one person who isn’t there. The question breaks through the frosted glass. “Bobby, where is he?” “Eddie…” Bobby says slowly. “We can talk about it later when you’re feeling better.” “Bobby,” Eddie says, slow and calm despite the panic racing through his veins. “I need to know.” Or: An AU where Doug kidnaps Buck to get to Maddie

entry.title: some things stay
entry.summary:
Author: literalmetaphor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,074Chapters: 10/15Kudos: 115

Summary: “You gotta be pretty desperate to take a job like this, especially with a kid.” “Why’s that?” Eddie’s face flickers through a dozen almost-expression, like hail against a window pane, never quite breaking through. Buck ticks the reason off on his fingers. “You got a ghost story looming over everything. No civilization for miles. The place is old and dark and, well, let’s be honest—creepy. The proprietor is an obvious drunk. That enough for you?” Eddie scoffs. “You forgot to mention the incredibly off-putting gardener.” Buck definitely does not smile. “That too.” Then, “So, I figure there’s something equally wrong with you.” -- A loose Bly Manor AU.

entry.title: Life's Silver Linings
entry.summary:
Author: kmj07

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,870Chapters: 2/18Kudos: 2

Summary: His recovery from being struck by lightning finally over, Buck is approved to go back to work, but light duty only. Rather than spend a month as the man behind on every shift for a month, Bobby finds an alternative for him: a month doing demonstrations at schools throughout the LA area. So of course, Buck jumps at the opportunity. Little does he know, this one decision is going to change everything. Canon compliant up to season 7, then some things in season 7 still happen, but maybe at different sequences than canon. Absolutely not compliant with 8 or 9.

entry.title: Better The Devil You Know, Than The Devil You Don't...
entry.summary:
Author: InterrogateTheCat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,413Chapters: 25/50Kudos: 1,026

Summary: Lucifer made a deal with the Buckley's, he will save Daniel and they take in and love his son Evan as their own. When the Buckley parents don't follow through with their side of the deal, Lucifer brings Evan with him to LA. This is the story of Evan Buckley the Son of the Devil, The Prince of Hell. Note:First 2 Chapters go through his life before the 118.Chapter 3 he is with the 118.Chapter 4 is when Eddie arrives. [You don't really need to watch Lucifer, but it would be helpful, but enough context will be supplied.] This is mostly in 911 universe, with comments and references from the Lucifer universe. 🫣🤭 😈 🔪 🚒 🚔 🪽

entry.title: fangs and all
entry.summary:
Author: bari_astralis

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,239Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 225

Summary: “Buck, what are you doing?” “Calling Athena.” “Why?” “So she can arrest me.” “For God's sake," Eddie cursed, taking his phone. “Let’s backtrack, why do you think you want to eat people?” “Oh, I don’t know, I got bored with chicken,” Buck spat. “How should I fucking know? I wake up and all of a sudden, I want to put these in your neck.” He pointed at his teeth. “Just my neck?” “Eddie!” or: in which it takes Buck becoming a vampire for Buddie to happen.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: How Far Do I Have to Fall?
entry.summary:
Author: shadowkatninjawarrior

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,086Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 844

Summary: A week into the lawsuit, Buck realises what a mistake he's making. But when he tries to back out, Mackey responds with blackmail. Confronted with evidence of the years Buck spent as a sex worker to survive, Buck takes it to the police. One hush hush sting operation later, Buck can head back to work. Everything will be fine.It won't matter that no one knows about the blackmail... Right?Or,More lawsuit angst, because I simply can't help myself.

entry.title: won't fear the reaper
entry.summary:
Author: lscar123

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,284Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Buck and Eddie are both dealing, and not dealing, with the scars left behind from the Reaper's attacks and the summer of terror that gripped the city of Los Angeles. When Eddie is presented with an opportunity to get himself and Buck out of town during the one-year anniversary of the attack, it's easy to say yes to a stay in a secluded wilderness resort in the California mountains. Away from Los Angeles and all the bad memories of the previous summer, Buck and Eddie hope to come to terms with their still-new relationship and the trauma that it was born from. But the wilderness isn't as secluded as it seems. Someone new is after Buck and Eddie, and this killer is trying to create a sequel to the horror movie that they've already survived. The Reaper stalks the darkness once again, and this one is far more dangerous than the original.
